title: Networks, Queues, Simulation, and Operations Research · Quantity Clinic: Network Flow
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving routing, queues, and allocation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math adv network flow increment in a reproducible operations research computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate network flow in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Communicate time series forecast in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
